message:
feat: Add ngram speculation cache infrastructure

Add NgramCache module for token sequence caching:
- Records token sequences for future speculation
- LRU eviction with configurable max entries
- Confidence-based speculation (tracks accept/reject rates)
- Integrated into Scheduler for automatic token recording

Current state:
- Cache recording works (tokens are tracked)
- Speculation lookup implemented
- TODO: Add batch verification for actual speedup

This is the foundation for ngram-based speculative decoding
which can provide 1.2-1.5x speedup without extra memory.
